scripts.validate: bun scripts/validate_marked_comments.ts templates/linear-plan-comment.md templates/linear-status-comment.md templates/linear-dashboard-comment.md templates/linear-claim-block.md examples/plan-comment.md examples/status-comment.md examples/dashboard-comment.md examples/review-ready-status-comment.md examples/review-ready-dashboard-comment.md
scripts.render-examples: bun scripts/render_issue.ts examples/bug-input.yaml && bun scripts/render_issue.ts examples/feature-input.yaml
scripts.hooks:run: lefthook run pre-commit --all-files && lefthook run pre-push --all-files
scripts.validate:node: tsx scripts/validate_marked_comments.ts templates/linear-plan-comment.md templates/linear-status-comment.md templates/linear-dashboard-comment.md examples/plan-comment.md examples/status-comment.md examples/dashboard-comment.md examples/review-ready-status-comment.md examples/review-ready-dashboard-comment.md
